statement: In every magma, Equation 700 (`x = y * (x * ((z * w) * z))`) implies Equation 273 (`x = ((y * x) * y) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0390
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op x (op (op z w) z)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y x) y) x)
